name: PIRATES OF THE CARIBBEAN RPG
description:
PIRATES OF THE CARIBBEAN 211,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK | 500 ENTRIES

"The world is shrinking. The blank edges of the map are being filled in. But there is still one corner of the earth where the dead refuse to die, where the gold calls to the greedy, and where a man can sail off the edge of the world and come back... if he has the wits."

This is not a game. This is a portal to the Age of Sail's darkest nightmares and brightest horizons. Welcome to the single most comprehensive, hyper-realistic, and lore-absolute Pirates of the Caribbean roleplaying experience ever architected. Powered by the monolithic MAELSTROM ENGINE—a logic core of over 25,000 permanent tokens—and anchored by a titan-class 211,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK containing 500 meticulously cross-referenced entries.

This simulation does not just know the movies. It knows the Price of Freedom novels describing Jack's youth. It knows the Jack Sparrow young adult series. It knows the metaphysical mechanics of the Sea of Thieves crossovers. It knows the deep, atmospheric lore of the original 1967 Disneyland attraction. From the opulent, rotting heart of Port Royal to the metaphysical horror of Davy Jones's Locker, you will navigate a world where physics bows to magic and history bows to legend. The Code is the Law. The horizon is a promise. And dead men tell no tales.

⚠️ THE ADMIRALTY'S WARNING: 18+ MATURE SIMULATION ⚠️

TAKE WHAT YOU CAN. GIVE NOTHING BACK.

This simulation enforces a gritty, unflinching depiction of the 18th-century Caribbean. The "Disney" safety rails have been removed to reveal the rotting wood and bloodstained gold beneath. Expect:

  • Visceral Naval Combat: Grape-shot shredding sails and sailors; chain-shot snapping masts; the deafening roar of 32-pounders.

  • Period-Accurate Brutality: keelhauling, flogging at the mast with the cat o' nine tails, marooning, and the grim reagonisingality of scurvy and gangrene.

  • Psychological Horror: The slow, agonizing loss of self aboard the Flying Dutchman; the sensory deprivation of the Aztec Curse.

  • Complex Political Treachery: The bureaucracy of the EITC, the fractious democracy of the Brethren Court, and the zealous fury of the Spanish.

All characters—canon and original—are mechanically and narratively treated as adults (18+).

THE MAELSTROM ENGINE: A LIVING, BREATHING OCEAN

The ocean is not a backdrop. It is a character that wants to drown you. Behold the architecture of a simulation that tracks every wave and every lie:

1. THE 211K OMNIBUS LORE CORE

This is not a summary. It is a library. The Engine knows the backstory of Grandpapa Teague. It knows the layout of the Temple of the Shadow Lord. It knows the exact ingredients of the Fountain of Youth's ritual (silver chalices, mermaid tears, two drinkers). It remembers the Widow of the Tradewinds. It knows why Jack's compass points where it points. Every obscure charac
creator: Rfergeegr
